issues.title: console.log() left in component
issues.description: console.log calls shipped to production expose internal data to end users and clutter the browser DevTools console.
issues.suggestion:
Remove before shipping. For intentional debug logging, gate it:
if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") console.log(...)
